title: Cyrtopera longisepala
intro: Cyrtopera longisepala is a plant species commonly known as the 'African Yellow Lily' or 'Yellow Lily Orchid', belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various African cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, providing relief from fever, wounds, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Cyrtopera longisepala include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include decoctions and infusions, often used to treat various health conditions, as well as in traditional rituals and ceremonies.
